meta.source: XCMG_北美挖机产品线洞察_11.14_源文件.pptx
meta.scoring_boundary: Market and field insight modules do not alter the Excel-based benchmark scores.
meta.market_time_basis: 2023-2024 historical actual; 2025 historical estimate; 2026 historical forecast pending actual backfill.

role.zh: 狭窄空间、高频转场和轻型运输是本吨级的核心价值，客户同时比较驾驶棚/驾驶室、属具覆盖和非专业机手易用性。
role.en: Confined access, frequent relocation and light transport define this class. Buyers also compare canopy/cab availability, attachment coverage and ease of use for occasional operators.

transport.zh: 历史运输组合为轻型皮卡加 6K 拖车；XE18U 自重 1,795 kg。实际交付应按快换、拇指钳、铲斗和驾驶室等完整配置复核组合总重。
transport.en: The historical reference is a light-duty pickup with a 6K trailer and a 1,795 kg XE18U base machine. Actual delivery packages must be checked with coupler, thumb, buckets and cab equipment included.

customers.zh: 园林承包商、租赁商、市政维护单位、农场及小型施工队
customers.en: Landscape contractors, rental fleets, municipalities, farms and small contractors

jobs.zh: 景观整形、住宅改造、管线沟槽、市政维护、农业清理
jobs.en: Landscaping, residential renovation, utility trenching, municipal maintenance and farm cleanup

purchase.zh: 运输便利、窄机身与短尾、可伸缩底盘、动臂偏摆、驾驶室选择和属具流量
purchase.en: Transportability, narrow packaging, short tail, variable undercarriage, boom swing, cab choice and auxiliary flow

body.zh: 覆盖场地清理、种植坑开挖、地形修整和排水沟施工，要求机器能穿过窄门并减少对既有景观的扰动。
body.en: Covers site cleanup, planting holes, shaping and drainage trenches, with emphasis on passing narrow gates and limiting disturbance to finished areas.

requirements.zh: 窄机身、可伸缩底盘、精细微动和低接地扰动
requirements.en: Narrow width, variable undercarriage, fine modulation and low ground disturbance

body.zh: 用于后院、建筑周边和室内外改造中的开挖、拆除、装车与回填，作业空间通常受围墙和既有建筑约束。
body.en: Supports excavation, light demolition, loading and backfill around homes and commercial buildings where fences and existing structures constrain movement.

requirements.zh: 短尾、动臂偏摆、拇指钳和可控回转
requirements.en: Short tail, boom swing, thumb and controlled swing

body.zh: 面向人行道、路缘、绿化带和浅层管线维护，频繁转场要求启停平顺、装卸快速且安全警示完整。
body.en: Targets sidewalks, curbs, verges and shallow utilities; frequent moves require smooth travel, quick loading and complete warning equipment.

requirements.zh: 行走线性、运输效率、报警和照明
requirements.en: Travel modulation, transport efficiency, alarms and lighting

body.zh: 用于小型沟渠、围栏、灌溉和土地清理，非专业机手更加关注操作直观、稳定性和附件切换。
body.en: Used for small ditches, fencing, irrigation and land cleanup, where occasional operators value intuitive control, stability and attachment changes.

requirements.zh: 易操作性、稳定性、快换和多属具
requirements.en: Ease of use, stability, coupler and multi-attachment capability

basis.zh: 短尾布置满足受限空间，基础运输质量适合轻型组合。
basis.en: Short-tail packaging supports confined work and the base mass fits a light transport concept.

gap.zh: 完整附件包后的组合重量边界尚需统一管理。
gap.en: The transport margin of the fully equipped package is not yet governed as one envelope.

action.zh: 建立基础机、快换、拇指钳、铲斗和驾驶室的配置质量清单。
action.en: Create a configuration mass sheet covering base machine, coupler, thumb, buckets and cab.

basis.zh: 可选长斗杆、AUX1 流量、斗杆力和系统压力具备纸面基础。
basis.en: Optional long stick, AUX1 flow, arm force and system pressure provide a sound paper baseline.

gap.zh: 动臂偏摆范围、行驶速度和复合动作仍弱于标杆。
gap.en: Boom-swing range, travel speed and combined-function performance trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 联合优化偏摆包络、行走标定和复合动作流量分配。
action.en: Jointly optimize boom-swing envelope, travel calibration and combined-flow allocation.

basis.zh: 安全标识及多数间接安全配置较完整。
basis.en: Safety labels and most indirect safety provisions are broadly complete.

gap.zh: 脚踏阀死区、行走加速线性和回转制动需要改进。
gap.en: Pedal deadband, travel acceleration linearity and swing braking need improvement.

action.zh: 开展仪器化操控测试，锁定脚踏阀、回转制动和软件标定目标。
action.en: Run instrumented control tests and lock targets for pedal valves, swing braking and software calibration.

basis.zh: 低油耗和基础维修性具备优势。
basis.en: Low fuel use and basic serviceability are positive foundations.

gap.zh: 驾驶室覆盖、涂层防锈和橡胶件耐久弱于标杆。
gap.en: Cab availability, coating corrosion resistance and rubber durability trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 补齐驾驶室方案并实施涂层、紧固件和橡胶件耐久验证。
action.en: Complete the cab offer and validate coatings, fasteners and rubber durability.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 80%

benchmark.zh: 久保田 U27-4 / 山猫同级产品

role.zh: 本吨级延续微挖的园林、市政和住宅需求，但客户开始更重视驾驶室、挖掘力、AUX 流量和连续作业舒适性。
role.en: This class retains landscaping, municipal and residential demand while placing greater weight on cab availability, digging force, auxiliary flow and all-day comfort.

transport.zh: 运输评价应按驾驶室、快换、拇指钳和常用铲斗后的交付质量进行，不仅比较基础机重量；同一拖车组合还需核验轴荷与固定方案。
transport.en: Transport should be evaluated at delivered mass with cab, coupler, thumb and common buckets, not base-machine mass alone; axle loading and securement also require verification.

customers.zh: 园林与景观承包商、租赁商、市政单位、住宅改造和小型公用工程客户
customers.en: Landscape contractors, rental fleets, municipalities, residential renovators and light utility contractors

jobs.zh: 清表、平地、沟槽、破碎、钻孔、抓取、起吊和回填
jobs.en: Clearing, grading, trenching, breaking, augering, grabbing, lifting and backfill

purchase.zh: 驾驶室与空调、AUX2、多属具适配、行走效率、铲斗力和维修可达性
purchase.en: Cab and HVAC, AUX2, attachment coverage, travel productivity, bucket force and service access

body.zh: 2-3 吨机型可承担更连续的挖沟、整形和材料搬运，同时仍需保持后院和城市绿地的通过性。
body.en: The 2-3 t class supports more continuous trenching, shaping and material handling while retaining access to yards and urban green space.

requirements.zh: 短尾、驾驶室选择、微动和多属具
requirements.en: Short tail, cab choice, fine control and multi-attachment capability

body.zh: 用于浅层管线、路缘和道路维护，作业链同时包含挖掘、装车、回填和短距离转场。
body.en: Used for shallow utilities, curbs and road maintenance with excavation, loading, backfill and short relocations in one cycle.

requirements.zh: 行走速度、AUX 流量、平地协调和警示配置
requirements.en: Travel speed, auxiliary flow, grading coordination and warning equipment

body.zh: 破碎锤、拇指钳和螺旋钻等属具扩展了应用，但对 AUX1 流量、AUX2、快换和冷却余量提出更高要求。
body.en: Breaker, thumb and auger work expands the application envelope while increasing demand on AUX1 flow, AUX2, coupler performance and cooling reserve.

requirements.zh: AUX1/AUX2、快换、流量设定和驾驶防护
requirements.en: AUX1/AUX2, coupler, flow settings and operator protection

basis.zh: 基础尺寸和工作范围与久保田总体接近。
basis.en: Base dimensions and working range are broadly close to Kubota.

gap.zh: 整机高度与交付质量需按运输组合继续控制。
gap.en: Overall height and delivered mass require continued transport-envelope control.

action.zh: 建立交付状态运输边界并按驾驶室/驾驶棚分别确认。
action.en: Define delivered transport envelopes separately for cab and canopy versions.

basis.zh: 标配 AUX2，平地复合协调性具备优势。
basis.en: Standard AUX2 and grading coordination are strengths.

gap.zh: 行驶速度、AUX1 流量和铲斗挖掘力低于标杆。
gap.en: Travel speed, AUX1 flow and bucket digging force trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 优化泵阀匹配、行走标定和铲斗机构参数。
action.en: Optimize pump/valve matching, travel calibration and bucket linkage targets.

basis.zh: 7 英寸显示器和信息呈现具备基础。
basis.en: The 7-inch display and information presentation provide a good base.

gap.zh: 双速切换、脚踏死区、空调和座椅减震存在差距。
gap.en: Two-speed switching, pedal deadband, HVAC and seat suspension remain gaps.

action.zh: 把双速控制移至高频操作区，补齐冷暖空调并优化座椅与行走微动。
action.en: Move two-speed control into the primary control zone, add heating/cooling and improve seat and travel modulation.

basis.zh: 燃油经济性优于历史标杆评价。
basis.en: Fuel economy was rated favorably against the historical benchmark.

gap.zh: 主阀可达性、涂装防锈和售后资料质量不足。
gap.en: Main-valve access, coating corrosion resistance and service-document quality are insufficient.

action.zh: 调整维修开口并建立涂装、标识和售后文件闭环。
action.en: Improve service openings and close the loop on coating, identification and service documentation.

concentration.en: Four leading brands hold about 74% combined

benchmark.zh: 久保田 U35/KX033 与迪尔 35P

role.zh: 3-4 吨是北美高频通用规格，覆盖承包商、租赁商、市政和景观客户；竞争力取决于带附件运输、多工具作业、短循环效率和全生命周期体验。
role.en: The 3-4 t class is a high-use general-purpose size for contractors, rental fleets, municipalities and landscapers. Competitiveness depends on equipped transport, multi-tool work, short-cycle productivity and lifecycle experience.

transport.zh: 历史记录中的 XE35U 基础质量为 4,200 kg；加副配重、快换、拇指钳和标准斗后的典型组合约 4,579 kg，已逼近 14K 拖车常见有效载荷边界。
transport.en: The historical XE35U base mass is 4,200 kg. A representative package with counterweight, coupler, thumb and bucket is about 4,579 kg, close to the common payload boundary of a 14K trailer.

customers.zh: 中小承包商、租赁商、市政及公用事业单位、景观与农业客户
customers.en: Small and mid-size contractors, rental fleets, municipalities, utilities, landscapers and agricultural users

jobs.zh: 沟槽、地基、景观、轻拆、回填、吊装和多属具作业
jobs.en: Trenching, foundations, landscaping, light demolition, backfill, lifting and multi-attachment work

purchase.zh: 带附件运输质量、属具覆盖、循环效率、可靠性、操控舒适性和残值
purchase.en: Equipped transport mass, attachment coverage, cycle productivity, reliability, operator comfort and residual value

body.zh: 经销商交付和客户转场通常要求一套运输组合携带主机及常用附件，因此采购判断必须看交付状态总重。
body.en: Dealer delivery and customer relocation often require one transport package to carry the machine and common attachments, so purchase decisions must use delivered mass.

requirements.zh: 整机减重、附件质量清单、装载固定和合规复核
requirements.en: Machine mass reduction, attachment mass sheet, securement and compliance review

body.zh: 小型拆除和改造需要铲斗、拇指钳、破碎锤与封闭驾驶环境，并要求在受限空间内完成拆分和装车。
body.en: Light demolition and renovation require buckets, thumb, breaker and an enclosed operator environment, with sorting and loading in constrained space.

requirements.zh: AUX 流量、驾驶防护、精细操控和作业范围
requirements.en: Auxiliary flow, operator protection, fine control and working range

body.zh: 现场测量、开挖、清底、管线安装和回填形成完整任务链，短尾和动臂偏摆直接影响贴边施工。
body.en: Surveying, excavation, cleanup, utility installation and backfill form a complete workflow; short tail and boom swing directly affect close-to-structure work.

requirements.zh: 挖掘深度、偏摆包络、回转力矩和推土铲功能
requirements.en: Digging depth, boom-swing envelope, swing torque and blade functions

body.zh: 从清表、整形、沟槽到回填和绿化收尾，需要一台机器频繁切换挖掘、搬运、平地和吊装动作。
body.en: From clearing and shaping through trenching, backfill and final landscaping, one machine must switch frequently among digging, handling, grading and lifting.

requirements.zh: 多属具、坡度/深度控制、微动和回填效率
requirements.en: Multi-attachment capability, grade/depth control, fine modulation and backfill productivity

basis.zh: 短尾可覆盖受限空间，附件配置较完整。
basis.en: The short-tail package supports confined work with broad attachment availability.

gap.zh: 整机偏重，且型谱缺少常规尾重载选择。
gap.en: Machine mass is high and the portfolio lacks a conventional-tail heavy-duty choice.

action.zh: 锁定轻量化交付质量边界，并评估同平台常规尾产品。
action.en: Lock a lightweight delivered-mass envelope and evaluate a conventional-tail platform variant.

basis.zh: 斗杆力、AUX2 和起吊数据具备纸面基础。
basis.en: Arm force, AUX2 and lift data provide paper strengths.

gap.zh: 行驶速度、AUX1 流量、铲斗力和回转回填效率偏弱。
gap.en: Travel speed, AUX1 flow, bucket force and swing/backfill productivity are weak.

action.zh: 联合优化行走、附件液压和回转制动/力矩标定。
action.en: Jointly optimize travel, attachment hydraulics and swing braking/torque calibration.

basis.zh: 安全配置整体接近历史标杆。
basis.en: Safety equipment is broadly close to the historical benchmark.

gap.zh: 微动、精准性、平顺性、座椅、空间和显示交互存在差距。
gap.en: Inching, precision, smoothness, seat, space and display interaction remain gaps.

action.zh: 以仪器测试和目标机手盲评锁定阀控、软件及驾驶室目标。
action.en: Use instrumented tests and blind operator evaluations to set valve, software and cab targets.

basis.zh: 燃油经济性具备潜在优势。
basis.en: Fuel economy shows potential advantage.

gap.zh: 防锈、涂层、橡胶件、维修加注和售后资料弱于标杆。
gap.en: Corrosion protection, coatings, rubber parts, service filling and after-sales documentation trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 补齐耐久验证、维修工时和文件准确性闭环。
action.en: Close validation loops for durability, service labor and documentation accuracy.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 85%

benchmark.zh: 久保田 U48 / KX040 与卡特同级产品
benchmark.en: Kubota U48 / KX040 and Caterpillar class benchmark

role.zh: 4-5 吨是北美微小挖销量第三的区间，市场主要集中在 4 吨级，购买逻辑是在作业能力和 14K 运输组合之间寻找平衡。
role.en: The 4-5 t range is the third-largest compact class in the source market view, concentrated near 4 t, where buyers balance work capability against a 14K transport package.

transport.zh: XE45U 加副配重、快换、拇指钳和挖沟斗后约 5.16 t；再携带清理斗时超过资料中的 5.2 t 有效载荷上限，运输灵活性成为核心约束。
transport.en: XE45U reaches about 5.16 t with counterweight, coupler, thumb and trenching bucket; adding a cleanup bucket exceeds the 5.2 t reference payload, making transport flexibility a primary constraint.

customers.zh: 市政与道路承包商、景观与住宅施工企业、租赁商和公用工程客户
customers.en: Municipal and road contractors, landscape and residential builders, rental fleets and utility contractors

jobs.zh: 人行道、排水沟、小型拆除、泳池与地基、景观土方
jobs.en: Sidewalks, drainage ditches, light demolition, pools and foundations, and landscape earthwork

purchase.zh: 带附件运输质量、稳定与起吊、AUX 流量、驾驶便利和回填效率
purchase.en: Equipped transport mass, stability and lift, auxiliary flow, operator convenience and backfill productivity

body.zh: 狭窄道路和人行区施工需要小回转包络、精准平地和对周边人员的安全隔离。
body.en: Work on narrow roads and pedestrian areas requires compact swing clearance, precise grading and safe separation from nearby people.

requirements.zh: 短尾、摄像头、精细操控和快速转场
requirements.en: Short tail, camera, fine control and fast relocation

body.zh: 开挖、清底、管件安装和回填要求工作范围、AUX 配置与推土铲动作协同。
body.en: Excavation, cleanup, pipe installation and backfill require coordinated working range, auxiliary circuits and blade functions.

requirements.zh: 挖深、流量、回填效率和坡度控制
requirements.en: Digging depth, flow, backfill productivity and grade control

body.zh: 破碎、拆分、抓取和装车连续发生，对铲斗力、拇指钳、破碎管路和驾驶防护提出综合要求。
body.en: Breaking, sorting, grabbing and loading occur in one cycle, combining requirements for bucket force, thumb, breaker plumbing and operator protection.

requirements.zh: 铲斗力、AUX、快换、驾驶防护
requirements.en: Bucket force, AUX, coupler and operator protection

body.zh: 受限宅基地内需要深挖、贴边、清底和土方装运，稳定性和最远端操控直接影响质量。
body.en: Confined residential sites require digging, close-wall work, cleanup and spoil handling; stability and far-reach control directly affect quality.

requirements.zh: 工作范围、稳定性、微动和运输组合
requirements.en: Working range, stability, fine control and transport package

basis.zh: 整机稳定性和起吊表现优于历史标杆判断。
basis.en: Machine stability and lifting were rated favorably in the historical comparison.

gap.zh: 带完整附件运输余量不足，资料建议减重 100-150 kg。
gap.en: The fully equipped transport margin is limited; the source recommends a 100-150 kg mass reduction.

action.zh: 以 14K 运输包为边界开展轻量化，并保持起吊稳定性。
action.en: Use the 14K transport package as the mass target while preserving lifting stability.

basis.zh: 斗杆力、系统流量和机具流量具备优势。
basis.en: Arm force, system flow and attachment flow are strengths.

gap.zh: 铲斗挖掘力偏低，回转启停晃动稍大。
gap.en: Bucket force is low and swing start/stop oscillation is excessive.

action.zh: 优化铲斗机构和回转制动标定，并验证复合动作。
action.en: Optimize bucket linkage and swing-braking calibration, then validate combined functions.

basis.zh: 起吊报警、回转制动、后视摄像头和 7 英寸交互具备基础。
basis.en: Lift alarm, swing brake, rear camera and 7-inch interface provide a sound base.

gap.zh: 驾驶操作仍需在高频任务中验证可及性和视野。
gap.en: Control reach and visibility still require validation in frequent tasks.

action.zh: 按目标机手和典型任务开展人机诊断。
action.en: Run ergonomic diagnostics with target operators and representative tasks.

basis.zh: 覆盖件开启与基础维修性接近标杆。
basis.en: Panel access and basic serviceability are close to the benchmark.

gap.zh: 油漆、防锈和橡胶件耐久仍需加强。
gap.en: Paint, corrosion protection and rubber durability still need improvement.

action.zh: 补充高海拔、防腐和长期耐久试验。
action.en: Add high-altitude, corrosion and long-duration validation.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 70%

benchmark.zh: 久保田 KX057/U55 与卡特 305 CR

role.zh: 5-6 吨是北美微小挖销量第二的区间；常规尾销量领先短尾，说明客户对起吊、稳定和重载能力的权重上升。
role.en: The 5-6 t range is the second-largest compact class in the source view. Conventional-tail volume leads short-tail volume, indicating greater emphasis on lift, stability and heavy-duty capability.

transport.zh: XE55U 带副配重、快换、拇指钳和两只常用铲斗后的典型组合约 6,255 kg，处于 16K 拖车资料参考载荷范围内。
transport.en: A representative XE55U package with counterweight, coupler, thumb and two common buckets is about 6,255 kg, within the referenced 16K trailer payload range.

customers.zh: 市政与公用工程承包商、景观施工企业、租赁商和中小土方客户
customers.en: Municipal and utility contractors, landscapers, rental fleets and small earthmoving contractors

jobs.zh: 沟槽与排水、基础、材料搬运、重载回填、景观和多属具作业
jobs.en: Trenching and drainage, foundations, material handling, heavy backfill, landscaping and multi-attachment work

purchase.zh: 稳定与起吊、发动机储备、铲斗力、属具流量、推土铲操控和安全摄像头
purchase.en: Stability and lift, engine reserve, bucket force, attachment flow, blade controls and safety camera

body.zh: 持续挖沟、管件搬运和回填要求液压温控、行走效率和推土铲操控连续稳定。
body.en: Continuous trenching, pipe handling and backfill require stable hydraulic temperature, travel productivity and blade control.

requirements.zh: 长时间液压性能、行走、吊装和回填
requirements.en: Sustained hydraulics, travel, lifting and backfill

body.zh: 本吨级承担更大土方量和更重物料，常规尾与副配重能够改善最远端稳定和起吊。
body.en: This class handles larger spoil volumes and heavier materials; conventional-tail packaging and counterweight improve far-reach stability and lift.

requirements.zh: 稳定性、工作范围、铲斗力和起吊表
requirements.en: Stability, working range, bucket force and lift chart

body.zh: 在景观工程中同时完成清表、挖沟、平地和材料搬运，操作手对微动、双速和偏摆控制非常敏感。
body.en: Landscape projects combine clearing, trenching, grading and material handling, making modulation, two-speed and blade-angle controls highly visible to operators.

requirements.zh: 微动、双速、推土铲偏摆和低噪声
requirements.en: Fine control, two-speed, angle blade and low noise

body.zh: 高流量附件和两套管路扩大破碎、钻孔和抓取能力，但要求发动机与主泵具备持续功率余量。
body.en: High-flow tools and dual circuits expand breaker, auger and grapple use but require sustained engine and pump power reserve.

requirements.zh: AUX1/AUX2、冷却、发动机储备和快换
requirements.en: AUX1/AUX2, cooling, engine reserve and coupler

basis.zh: 副配重、较高稳定性和起吊能力是纸面优势。
basis.en: Counterweight, stability and lifting capability are paper strengths.

gap.zh: 当前仅一款短尾，重载型谱覆盖弱于久保田。
gap.en: A single short-tail model provides less heavy-duty portfolio coverage than Kubota.

action.zh: 形成副配重标准包并评估重载/常规尾型谱。
action.en: Standardize a counterweight package and evaluate heavy-duty/conventional-tail coverage.

basis.zh: 斗杆力、起吊和附件流量表现较好。
basis.en: Arm force, lift and attachment flow perform well.

gap.zh: 发动机功率储备、铲斗力和行走驱动力偏弱。
gap.en: Engine reserve, bucket force and travel drive are weak.

action.zh: 升级动力与主泵匹配，优化铲斗机构和行走牵引。
action.en: Upgrade engine/pump matching and optimize bucket linkage and travel traction.

basis.zh: 多数安全功能及基础操控接近标杆。
basis.en: Most safety functions and base controls are close to the benchmark.

gap.zh: 缺少后视摄像头；偏摆与双速开关布局不便。
gap.en: Rear camera is missing and angle-blade/two-speed switch placement is inconvenient.

action.zh: 标配摄像头并把偏摆、双速集成到推土铲手柄。
action.en: Standardize the camera and integrate angle-blade/two-speed controls into the blade lever.

basis.zh: 燃油经济性和基础维修性具备优势。
basis.en: Fuel economy and basic serviceability are positive.

gap.zh: 高海拔动力储备、独立液压油加注和表面耐久不足。
gap.en: High-altitude power reserve, independent hydraulic-oil filling and surface durability are insufficient.

action.zh: 采用增压动力方案并改善加注口、防腐和橡胶件验证。
action.en: Use a turbocharged power solution and improve fill access, corrosion protection and rubber validation.

role.zh: 6-8 吨在产品线销量结构中属于小挖次销规格，价值不在单纯放大参数，而在兼顾运输、稳定、多属具和高利用率。
role.en: The 6-8 t range is an extended compact class. Its value is not simply larger specifications but a balance of transport, stability, attachment versatility and high utilization.

transport.zh: 本吨级应以交付状态质量、拖车轴荷、机宽机高和常用附件同车运输能力建立边界，并由最新州法规和承运方案复核。
transport.en: This class requires a delivered-mass envelope covering trailer axle loads, machine width/height and common attachments carried together, with current state regulations and carrier plans verified.

customers.zh: 租赁商、市政与公用工程承包商、景观与中小土方客户
customers.en: Rental fleets, municipal and utility contractors, landscapers and small earthmoving contractors

jobs.zh: 公用工程、沟槽、材料搬运、回填、坡地和多属具作业
jobs.en: Utility work, trenching, material handling, backfill, slopes and multi-attachment work

purchase.zh: 利用率、稳定与起吊、属具覆盖、运输包、可靠性和操控一致性
purchase.en: Utilization, stability and lift, attachment coverage, transport package, reliability and consistent controls

body.zh: 典型任务包括沟槽、管件吊装、回填和路面恢复，一台机器需要覆盖完整任务链。
body.en: Typical work includes trenching, pipe handling, backfill and surface restoration, requiring one machine to cover the full task chain.

requirements.zh: 工作范围、起吊、附件管路和回填效率
requirements.en: Working range, lift, attachment circuits and backfill productivity

body.zh: 更高质量级带来稳定性，同时也要求回转、动臂提升和装车循环保持协调。
body.en: The higher mass class adds stability while requiring coordinated swing, boom lift and loading cycles.

requirements.zh: 稳定性、回转力矩、提升速度和视野
requirements.en: Stability, swing torque, boom speed and visibility

body.zh: 租赁和市政客户需要机器在坡地、松软地面和不同机手之间保持可预测的行走与制动响应。
body.en: Rental and municipal users need predictable travel and braking on slopes, soft ground and across different operators.

requirements.zh: 牵引、制动、接地与操控一致性
requirements.en: Traction, braking, ground contact and control consistency

basis.zh: 该吨级补齐小挖从轻型施工到高利用率工程任务的过渡。
basis.en: This class bridges light compact work and higher-utilization contracting tasks.

gap.zh: 专项销量与实机场景资料没有单独拆分。
gap.en: Dedicated class-level sales and field-use evidence is not separately reported.

action.zh: 用当前源表和北美客户样本建立本吨级独立市场与工况证据。
action.en: Build class-specific market and jobsite evidence from the current workbook and North American customer samples.

basis.zh: 短尾和多属具能够覆盖市政与租赁需求。
basis.en: Short-tail packaging and multi-attachment capability support municipal and rental use.

gap.zh: 交付状态运输包和常用附件组合需要统一。
gap.en: Delivered transport and common attachment packages need one definition.

action.zh: 建立按客户类型区分的运输与附件包。
action.en: Define transport and attachment packages by customer type.

basis.zh: 本吨级应延续小挖对易用性和多功能的要求。
basis.en: This class should retain compact-machine ease of use and versatility.

gap.zh: 跨机手一致性、短循环效率和坡地操控需要实测。
gap.en: Cross-operator consistency, short-cycle productivity and slope control require field tests.

action.zh: 开展循环计时、坡地行走和多机手盲评。
action.en: Run cycle timing, slope travel and multi-operator blind evaluations.

basis.zh: 成熟市场客户高度重视稳定性和使用成本。
basis.en: Mature-market customers place high value on stability and ownership cost.

gap.zh: 当前缺少本吨级独立的耐久、维修工时和残值闭环。
gap.en: A class-specific loop for durability, service labor and residual value is missing.

action.zh: 建立故障、保养工时、备件和二手机残值台账。
action.en: Establish failure, service-labor, parts and used-value tracking.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 70%

benchmark.zh: 久保田 KX080 与卡特 308/309 CR

role.zh: 8-10 吨是微小挖销量第四的区间，客户已经接受 CDL 和重型运输组合，因此更关注生产率、稳定、起吊与附件能力。
role.en: The 8-10 t range is the fourth-largest compact segment in the source view. With CDL and heavy transport already accepted, buyers focus more on productivity, stability, lifting and attachment capability.

transport.zh: XE80U 带快换、拇指钳和常用铲斗后的典型组合约 10,210 kg，资料采用重型皮卡加 30K 鹅颈拖车，并明确需要 CDL。
transport.en: A representative XE80U package with coupler, thumb and common buckets is about 10,210 kg. The source uses a heavy-duty pickup and 30K gooseneck trailer and identifies CDL operation.

customers.zh: 专业承包商、租赁商、市政与公用工程客户、景观和轻土方企业
customers.en: Professional contractors, rental fleets, municipal/utility users, landscapers and light earthmoving firms

jobs.zh: 深沟、基础、土方、材料搬运、破碎、起吊和道路维护
jobs.en: Deep trenching, foundations, earthmoving, material handling, breaking, lifting and road maintenance

purchase.zh: 稳定、起吊、挖掘力、液压流量、运输高度、长斗杆和驾驶舒适性
purchase.en: Stability, lift, digging forces, hydraulic flow, transport height, long stick and operator comfort

body.zh: 更长作业循环和更重材料要求机器在挖掘、回转、行走和回填之间保持效率。
body.en: Longer cycles and heavier materials require efficient transitions among digging, swing, travel and backfill.

requirements.zh: 循环效率、视野、推土铲和报警
requirements.en: Cycle productivity, visibility, blade functions and alarms

body.zh: 深沟和基础开挖对长斗杆、稳定、挖深和吊装能力提出更高要求。
body.en: Deep trench and foundation work places greater demand on long-stick availability, stability, depth and lifting capability.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、稳定和起吊表
requirements.en: Long stick, digging depth, stability and lift chart

body.zh: 拇指钳、快换和大流量附件扩展了搬运与拆分任务，但牵引和回转响应需要匹配更大质量。
body.en: Thumb, coupler and high-flow tools expand handling and sorting, while travel and swing response must match the higher mass.

requirements.zh: AUX 流量、牵引、回转和稳定
requirements.en: Auxiliary flow, traction, swing and stability

body.zh: 更高发动机和液压能力支持破碎和切割，驾驶防护、冷却和附件设定决定持续作业能力。
body.en: Higher engine and hydraulic capability supports breaking and cutting; cab protection, cooling and tool settings determine sustained output.

requirements.zh: 防护、冷却、AUX 设定和快换
requirements.en: Protection, cooling, AUX settings and coupler

basis.zh: 动力和液压基础较强。
basis.en: Power and hydraulic foundations are strong.

gap.zh: 整机偏重、运输高度偏高，长斗杆状态下稳定性不足。
gap.en: Machine mass and transport height are high, with insufficient stability in long-stick configuration.

action.zh: 轻量化并重算长斗杆、配重和运输高度组合。
action.en: Reduce mass and recalculate long-stick, counterweight and transport-height combinations.

basis.zh: 主泵流量、压力和 AUX1 流量具备优势。
basis.en: Main-pump flow, pressure and AUX1 flow are strengths.

gap.zh: 铲斗力、牵引和起吊能力弱于主要竞品。
gap.en: Bucket force, traction and lift trail key competitors.

action.zh: 优化机构、行走驱动和稳定性，按任务循环验证。
action.en: Optimize linkage, travel drive and stability, then validate by task cycle.

basis.zh: 平地与行走优化后得到较好市场反馈。
basis.en: Grading and travel improvements received favorable market feedback.

gap.zh: 双速开关未集成，双动臂版本稳定性仍需提升。
gap.en: Two-speed control is not integrated and dual-boom stability still needs improvement.

action.zh: 优化手柄控制和双动臂配重/底盘匹配。
action.en: Improve lever controls and counterweight/undercarriage matching for dual-boom variants.

basis.zh: 三面开启覆盖件有利于维修。
basis.en: Three-side panel access supports serviceability.

gap.zh: 表面耐久和工作灯延迟等细节配置存在差距。
gap.en: Surface durability and details such as delayed work lights remain gaps.

action.zh: 补充耐久验证并建立高频客户配置清单。
action.en: Add durability validation and define a high-frequency customer equipment list.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 70%

role.zh: 12-14 吨市场总量较低且历史销量下滑，产品决策应优先验证真实客户和应用，而不是仅用参数覆盖证明必要性。
role.en: The 12-14 t market is relatively small and historically declined, so product decisions should validate real customers and applications rather than rely on specification coverage alone.

transport.zh: 13-16 吨级资料采用阶梯式拖车；宽度目标为 2,590 mm，并按单轴 9,072 kg 参考值配置两轴运输。实际运输需按州法规复核。
transport.en: The 13-16 t reference uses a step-deck trailer, a 2,590 mm width target and two axles based on a 9,072 kg per-axle reference. Actual moves require state-level verification.

customers.zh: 市政、公用工程、房建、道路施工和专业租赁客户
customers.en: Municipal, utility, building, roadwork and professional rental customers

jobs.zh: 沟槽、基础、土方、吊装、破碎和市政综合施工
jobs.en: Trenching, foundations, earthmoving, lifting, breaking and mixed municipal work

purchase.zh: 运输尺寸、长斗杆、起吊、行走效率、附件液压和智能辅助
purchase.en: Transport dimensions, long stick, lifting, travel productivity, attachment hydraulics and machine guidance

body.zh: 在城市项目中完成基坑、管线和回填，运输宽度、尾部包络和作业范围共同决定适配性。
body.en: Urban projects combine excavation, utilities and backfill, where transport width, tail envelope and working range jointly determine fit.

requirements.zh: 运输宽度、工作范围、稳定和回填效率
requirements.en: Transport width, working range, stability and backfill productivity

body.zh: 较深管线要求长斗杆、挖深、吊装和精确清底，缺少长斗杆会直接缩小任务覆盖。
body.en: Deeper utilities require a long stick, digging depth, lifting and precise cleanup; lack of a long stick directly narrows task coverage.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、起吊和 2D 引导
requirements.en: Long stick, digging depth, lift and 2D guidance

body.zh: 重载挖掘和装车需要挖掘力、回转、动臂提升和液压流量协同。
body.en: Heavy digging and truck loading require coordinated digging force, swing, boom lift and hydraulic flow.

requirements.zh: 循环时间、回转力矩、流量和燃油
requirements.en: Cycle time, swing torque, flow and fuel

body.zh: PTO、AUX 和卸油能力决定破碎锤及其他机具的持续输出，驾驶室防护决定安全边界。
body.en: PTO, AUX and case-drain capability determine sustained breaker and tool output, while cab protection defines the safety envelope.

requirements.zh: PTO/AUX、卸油、冷却和防护
requirements.en: PTO/AUX, case drain, cooling and protection

basis.zh: 发动机功率和重载挖掘基础较强。
basis.en: Engine power and heavy-digging foundation are strong.

gap.zh: 标配斗杆偏短，挖掘范围不足。
gap.en: The standard stick is short and limits working range.

action.zh: 加长标配斗杆并重算稳定、起吊和运输包络。
action.en: Lengthen the standard stick and recalculate stability, lift and transport envelope.

basis.zh: PTO、AUX1 合流和较大流量有利于附件作业。
basis.en: PTO, AUX1 combining and high flow support attachment work.

gap.zh: 全电控精度和复合动作智能化弱于卡特。
gap.en: Electrohydraulic precision and combined-function intelligence trail Caterpillar.

action.zh: 建立主泵、主阀和控制器联合标定目标。
action.en: Set joint calibration targets for pump, valve and controller.

basis.zh: 挖掘力和行走牵引力具备优势。
basis.en: Digging force and travel traction are strengths.

gap.zh: 起吊能力和行走速度弱于标杆。
gap.en: Lift and travel speed trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 优化稳定、起吊和行走驱动并完成载荷表验证。
action.en: Optimize stability, lift and travel drive and validate the lift chart.

basis.zh: 现有安全与附件基础可支持扩展。
basis.en: Existing safety and attachment foundations support further development.

gap.zh: 缺少 2D/3D、电子围栏和称重等智能功能。
gap.en: 2D/3D guidance, e-fence and payload functions are missing.

action.zh: 按客户任务配置智能包，并用作业效率和安全收益验证。
action.en: Configure an intelligent package by customer task and validate productivity and safety benefit.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 64% combined

role.zh: 14-16 吨是中挖热门短尾区间，面向城市道路、住宅和公共设施建设，核心价值是受限空间中的中挖生产率。
role.en: The 14-16 t range is a popular short-tail mid-size class for urban roads, residential and public infrastructure, combining confined-site packaging with mid-size productivity.

transport.zh: 资料采用阶梯式拖车并控制 2,590 mm 宽度；两轴运输能力按交付质量复核，州际限高与许可要求需逐项目确认。
transport.en: The reference uses a step-deck trailer with a 2,590 mm width target. Two-axle capacity must be checked at delivered mass and interstate height/permit requirements confirmed by project.

customers.zh: 城市道路、市政、公用工程、住宅建设和专业租赁客户
customers.en: Urban road, municipal, utility, residential construction and professional rental customers

jobs.zh: 受限空间基础、管线、土方、吊装、破碎和回填
jobs.en: Confined foundations, utilities, earthmoving, lifting, breaking and backfill

purchase.zh: 短尾包络、工作范围、起吊、流量、行走平顺和智能辅助
purchase.en: Short-tail envelope, working range, lift, flow, travel smoothness and machine guidance

body.zh: 短尾降低对车道和周边设施的侵入，但视野、警示和回转制动仍决定现场安全。
body.en: Short-tail packaging reduces lane and infrastructure intrusion, while visibility, warnings and swing braking still determine jobsite safety.

requirements.zh: 短尾、摄像头、警示和回转控制
requirements.en: Short tail, cameras, warnings and swing control

body.zh: 在受限空间中同时要求挖深、长斗杆和稳定，单纯缩短尾部不能替代工作范围。
body.en: Confined sites still require depth, long-stick coverage and stability; short tail alone cannot replace working range.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、稳定和精确控制
requirements.en: Long stick, depth, stability and precise control

body.zh: 管件和预制件吊装后紧接回填与整平，要求起吊表、回转、推土铲和行走复合稳定。
body.en: Pipe and precast lifting is followed by backfill and grading, requiring a verified lift chart and stable swing, blade and travel combinations.

requirements.zh: 起吊、回转、推土铲和复合动作
requirements.en: Lift, swing, blade and combined functions

body.zh: 城市改造对低噪声、驾驶防护、附件管路和快速换装提出更高要求。
body.en: Urban renovation raises requirements for low noise, operator protection, attachment plumbing and rapid tool changes.

requirements.zh: AUX、卸油、防护、冷却和快换
requirements.en: AUX, case drain, protection, cooling and coupler

basis.zh: 短尾布置适合城市受限工地。
basis.en: Short-tail packaging fits confined urban jobsites.

gap.zh: 标配斗杆偏短，挖掘范围没有优势。
gap.en: The standard stick is short and working range lacks advantage.

action.zh: 加长斗杆并同步验证尾部、稳定和运输边界。
action.en: Lengthen the stick and jointly validate tail clearance, stability and transport limits.

basis.zh: 发动机、挖掘力、起吊和附件系统基础较好。
basis.en: Engine power, digging force, lift and attachment system provide a good base.

gap.zh: 主泵流量和全电控智能化弱于标杆。
gap.en: Main-pump flow and electrohydraulic intelligence trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 升级主泵并建立泵阀控一体化标定。
action.en: Upgrade the main pump and establish integrated pump/valve/controller calibration.

basis.zh: 行走电控与阀芯优化已提供改进基础。
basis.en: Travel electronic control and spool optimization provide an improvement base.

gap.zh: 行走与上车复合的平顺性仍有差距。
gap.en: Travel and upper-structure combined-function smoothness remains a gap.

action.zh: 用加速度、冲击和循环时间建立客观标定目标。
action.en: Set objective calibration targets using acceleration, shock and cycle time.

basis.zh: 现有安全和机具系统可作为集成平台。
basis.en: Existing safety and tool systems can support integration.

gap.zh: 2D/3D 智能辅助和高级安全功能不足。
gap.en: 2D/3D guidance and advanced safety functions are insufficient.

action.zh: 按城市沟槽、平地和吊装任务配置智能包。
action.en: Configure an intelligent package for urban trenching, grading and lifting.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 70% combined

role.zh: 19-24 吨是中大挖热门区间，覆盖中大型土方、建筑地基和市政工程；竞品通过高、中、经济配置形成客户分层。
role.en: The 19-24 t range is a high-volume mid-size class for earthmoving, foundations and municipal work. Competitors segment customers with premium, core and economy configurations.

transport.zh: XE225U 运输高度 3,030 mm，资料采用阶梯式拖车和三轴承载，并指出机宽超过 2,590 mm 时需要超宽许可。
transport.en: XE225U transport height is 3,030 mm. The reference uses a step-deck trailer and three axles and identifies an oversize-width permit when machine width exceeds 2,590 mm.

customers.zh: 土方与基础承包商、市政道路企业、专业租赁商和公用工程客户
customers.en: Earthmoving and foundation contractors, municipal road firms, professional rental fleets and utilities

jobs.zh: 土方装车、基础、沟槽、破碎、吊装和场地平整
jobs.en: Truck loading, foundations, trenching, breaking, lifting and site grading

purchase.zh: 循环效率、可靠性、附件系统、起吊、智能辅助、服务与残值
purchase.en: Cycle productivity, reliability, attachment system, lifting, machine guidance, service and residual value

body.zh: 中大规模土方要求挖掘、回转、提升和装车循环保持稳定产量。
body.en: Medium-to-large earthmoving requires consistent output across digging, swing, boom lift and truck loading.

requirements.zh: 循环时间、斗容、回转力矩和油耗
requirements.en: Cycle time, bucket capacity, swing torque and fuel

body.zh: 建筑基础和深沟需要长斗杆、精确控制、起吊和高密封驾驶环境。
body.en: Building foundations and deep trenches require a long stick, precise control, lifting and a sealed operator environment.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、起吊和驾驶防护
requirements.en: Long stick, digging depth, lift and cab protection

body.zh: 标配 AUX1、AUX2、卸油、PTO 和合流能够提升机具匹配，但持续输出仍需温控和结构验证。
body.en: Standard AUX1, AUX2, case drain, PTO and flow combining improve tool matching, while sustained output still requires thermal and structural validation.

requirements.zh: 流量、压力、冷却、管路和防护
requirements.en: Flow, pressure, cooling, plumbing and protection

basis.zh: 基础参数与标杆总体接近。
basis.en: Base parameters are broadly close to the benchmark.

gap.zh: 缺少长斗杆，深沟作业受限。
gap.en: The lack of a long stick limits deep-trench work.

action.zh: 配置长斗杆并同步建立起吊、稳定和运输数据。
action.en: Offer a long stick and jointly establish lift, stability and transport data.

basis.zh: 系统流量、AUX1/AUX2、卸油、PTO 和合流具备优势。
basis.en: System flow, AUX1/AUX2, case drain, PTO and flow combining are strengths.

gap.zh: 回转系统压力和铲斗挖掘力偏低。
gap.en: Swing-system pressure and bucket digging force are low.

action.zh: 优化回转与铲斗机构，保持附件系统优势。
action.en: Optimize swing and bucket linkage while preserving attachment-system strengths.

basis.zh: 行走电控和阀芯优化改善了复合动作。
basis.en: Travel electronic control and spool optimization improved combined functions.

gap.zh: 停止上车动作时行走冲击较大，智能辅助和 360°环视不足。
gap.en: Travel shock occurs when upper functions stop, and guidance/360-degree visibility are insufficient.

action.zh: 优化全电控标定并完成 360°与 2D/3D 功能验证。
action.en: Optimize electrohydraulic calibration and validate 360-degree vision and 2D/3D functions.

basis.zh: 高密封增压驾驶室和全防护适合破碎作业。
basis.en: A sealed pressurized cab and full guarding support breaker work.

gap.zh: 起吊能力和回转装车效率弱于高配标杆。
gap.en: Lift and swing-loading productivity trail premium benchmarks.

action.zh: 用载荷表、循环计时和冲击数据设定重载目标。
action.en: Set heavy-duty targets using lift charts, cycle timing and shock data.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 75% combined

role.zh: 24-28 吨市场同时存在常规尾和短尾，历史销量中短尾总体更好；常规尾仍承担大范围、重载和高效率任务。
role.en: The 24-28 t market includes conventional- and short-tail machines, with short-tail historically stronger overall, while conventional-tail machines retain working-range, heavy-duty and productivity roles.

transport.zh: XE250U 运输高度 3,210 mm、操作质量约 27,300 kg，资料采用三轴低底盘拖车并指出承载已接近参考边界，运输灵活性有限。
transport.en: XE250U transport height is 3,210 mm and operating mass about 27,300 kg. The source uses a three-axle lowboy and notes that payload is near the reference boundary, limiting transport flexibility.

customers.zh: 大型土方、道路桥梁、城市建设、基础与专业租赁客户
customers.en: Large earthmoving, road/bridge, urban construction, foundation and professional rental customers

jobs.zh: 大土方装车、深沟、破碎、吊装、平地和重型附件
jobs.en: Bulk loading, deep trenching, breaking, lifting, grading and heavy attachments

purchase.zh: 生产率、挖掘力、回转、工作范围、附件系统、智能化和运输成本
purchase.en: Productivity, digging forces, swing, working range, attachment system, intelligence and transport cost

body.zh: 常规尾和较大工作范围支持大斗容装车，但最远端平地的斗杆控制需要保持稳定。
body.en: Conventional-tail packaging and working range support larger-bucket loading, while far-reach grading requires stable stick control.

requirements.zh: 斗容、回转、提升、平地微动和燃油
requirements.en: Bucket capacity, swing, boom lift, grading modulation and fuel

body.zh: 缺少长斗杆会限制深沟覆盖，负流量系统的微操控也会影响清底和边坡质量。
body.en: Lack of a long stick limits deep-trench coverage, while negative-flow modulation affects cleanup and slope quality.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、微动和 2D/3D 引导
requirements.en: Long stick, depth, fine control and 2D/3D guidance

body.zh: 行走与上车复合、回转制动和平地协调直接影响循环和操作冲击。
body.en: Travel/upper combined functions, swing braking and grading coordination directly affect cycle time and operating shock.

requirements.zh: 复合动作、回转制动、平地和行走
requirements.en: Combined functions, swing braking, grading and travel

body.zh: AUX1、AUX2、卸油、PTO 和合流支持高流量机具，高密封驾驶室和防护构成安全基础。
body.en: AUX1, AUX2, case drain, PTO and flow combining support high-flow tools; sealed cab and guarding provide the safety base.

requirements.zh: 流量、压力、冷却、防护和结构耐久
requirements.en: Flow, pressure, cooling, guarding and structural durability

basis.zh: 标配挖掘范围和恶劣路面行走驱动力具备优势。
basis.en: Standard working range and travel drive on difficult ground are strengths.

gap.zh: 三轴运输接近载荷边界。
gap.en: Three-axle transport is near the payload boundary.

action.zh: 控制交付质量并评估附件拆分运输方案。
action.en: Control delivered mass and evaluate split shipment of attachments.

basis.zh: 系统流量、AUX 和机具合流优于标杆。
basis.en: System flow, AUX and attachment-flow combining are strengths.

gap.zh: 负流量系统微操控和智能化不足。
gap.en: Negative-flow fine control and machine intelligence are insufficient.

action.zh: 升级控制架构并保留附件液压优势。
action.en: Upgrade the control architecture while retaining attachment-hydraulic strengths.

basis.zh: 行走驱动力和系统流量适合泥泞及机具工况。
basis.en: Travel drive and system flow support soft-ground and tool applications.

gap.zh: 挖掘力和回转力矩弱于卡特，影响装车循环。
gap.en: Digging force and swing torque trail Caterpillar and affect loading cycles.

action.zh: 按大斗容装车循环优化机构、回转和提升。
action.en: Optimize linkage, swing and boom lift using large-bucket loading cycles.

basis.zh: 驾驶室密封与附件防护具备基础。
basis.en: Cab sealing and attachment protection provide a good base.

gap.zh: 缺少成熟 360°环视和高级智控。
gap.en: Mature 360-degree vision and advanced control functions are missing.

action.zh: 完成 360°、2D/3D 和安全边界的整机验证。
action.en: Complete machine validation of 360-degree vision, 2D/3D and safety boundaries.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 75% combined

role.zh: 24-28 吨历史销量中短尾总体更好，核心客户在城市、居民区和道路项目中需要降低尾部碰撞风险，同时保留中挖生产率。
role.en: Short-tail machines historically lead the 24-28 t range, serving urban, residential and road projects that need lower tail-strike risk without giving up mid-size productivity.

transport.zh: XE235UCR 运输高度 3,181 mm、操作质量约 26,300 kg，资料显示可落在三轴低底盘参考承载范围内，但仍需超宽许可。
transport.en: XE235UCR transport height is 3,181 mm and operating mass about 26,300 kg, within the referenced three-axle lowboy payload while still requiring an oversize-width permit.

customers.zh: 城市建设、市政道路、居民区基础、公用工程和专业租赁客户
customers.en: Urban construction, municipal roads, residential foundations, utilities and professional rental fleets

jobs.zh: 受限空间土方、沟槽、回填、吊装、破碎和多属具
jobs.en: Confined earthmoving, trenching, backfill, lifting, breaking and multi-tool work

purchase.zh: 短尾安全、运输、工作范围、复合动作、附件液压和驾驶视野
purchase.en: Short-tail safety, transport, working range, combined functions, attachment hydraulics and visibility

body.zh: 短尾降低对车道和邻近建筑的侵入，最远端平地和回转制动决定施工质量与冲击。
body.en: Short-tail packaging reduces lane and building intrusion; far-reach grading and swing braking determine quality and shock.

requirements.zh: 尾部包络、视野、平地微动和回转控制
requirements.en: Tail envelope, visibility, grading modulation and swing control

body.zh: 在受限空间中仍需要长斗杆和精确清底，短尾不能替代工作范围和稳定验证。
body.en: Confined work still requires a long stick and precise cleanup; short tail cannot replace working range and stability validation.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、起吊和稳定
requirements.en: Long stick, depth, lift and stability

body.zh: 行走与上车复合、回转制动和推土铲动作影响城市工程中的短循环效率。
body.en: Travel/upper combined functions, swing braking and blade actions affect short-cycle productivity in urban work.

requirements.zh: 复合动作、回转、行走和平地
requirements.en: Combined functions, swing, travel and grading

body.zh: 高密封驾驶室、全防护和完整附件管路是城市拆改及重型机具作业的基础。
body.en: A sealed cab, full guarding and complete attachment plumbing support urban demolition and heavy-tool work.

requirements.zh: 驾驶防护、AUX、卸油、冷却和噪声
requirements.en: Cab protection, AUX, case drain, cooling and noise

basis.zh: 短尾和较低交付质量更适合城市运输与施工。
basis.en: Short tail and lower delivered mass better suit urban transport and work.

gap.zh: 仍需超宽许可，附件组合会侵蚀载荷余量。
gap.en: Oversize-width permitting remains and attachment packages consume payload margin.

action.zh: 建立城市运输包和附件拆装流程。
action.en: Define an urban transport package and attachment removal process.

basis.zh: 基础作业能力可覆盖主流城市任务。
basis.en: Base capability covers mainstream urban tasks.

gap.zh: 缺少长斗杆和超长工装，深沟覆盖不足。
gap.en: Long-stick and long-reach options are missing, limiting deep-trench coverage.

action.zh: 优先配置长斗杆，超长工装按市场需求单独立项。
action.en: Prioritize a long stick; treat long-reach equipment as a separate market-driven program.

basis.zh: AUX、PTO、合流和驾驶防护具备优势。
basis.en: AUX, PTO, flow combining and cab protection are strengths.

gap.zh: 复合动作停止冲击和微操控线性不足。
gap.en: Combined-function stop shock and fine-control linearity are insufficient.

action.zh: 优化全电控回转与行走复合标定。
action.en: Optimize electrohydraulic swing and travel-combination calibration.

basis.zh: 短尾本体降低碰撞风险。
basis.en: Short-tail packaging inherently reduces strike risk.

gap.zh: 360°环视和高级智能辅助尚未形成成熟配置。
gap.en: 360-degree vision and advanced guidance are not yet mature equipment offers.

action.zh: 将环视、电子围栏和 2D/3D 组成城市安全包验证。
action.en: Validate an urban safety package combining surround view, e-fence and 2D/3D.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 74% combined

role.zh: 28-33 吨历史市场总量偏低、优先级低于相邻主销吨级，但现有负流量平台仍需要升级以维持基本竞争力。
role.en: The 28-33 t market is historically smaller and lower priority than adjacent core classes, but the current negative-flow platform still requires modernization to remain competitive.

transport.zh: XE300U 操作质量约 32,500 kg、运输高度 3,360 mm，资料采用四轴低底盘拖车并要求按超宽和轴荷复核。
transport.en: XE300U operating mass is about 32,500 kg and transport height 3,360 mm. The reference uses a four-axle lowboy with oversize-width and axle-load checks.

customers.zh: 中大型土方、道路桥梁、基础施工、采石辅助和专业租赁客户
customers.en: Medium/large earthmoving, road/bridge, foundation, quarry support and professional rental customers

jobs.zh: 重载挖掘、装车、深沟、破碎、吊装和水利施工
jobs.en: Heavy digging, truck loading, deep trenches, breaking, lifting and waterworks

purchase.zh: 发动机与液压效率、挖掘力、起吊、回转、工装覆盖和智能控制
purchase.en: Engine/hydraulic efficiency, digging force, lift, swing, work-equipment coverage and intelligent control

body.zh: 系统流量和挖掘力支持重载，但发动机储备和控制架构决定持续生产率。
body.en: System flow and digging force support heavy work, while engine reserve and control architecture determine sustained productivity.

requirements.zh: 发动机功率、流量、挖掘力和冷却
requirements.en: Engine power, flow, digging force and cooling

body.zh: 深沟和疏浚需要长斗杆或超长工装，缺少配置会直接限制投标与任务覆盖。
body.en: Deep trenching and dredging require long-stick or long-reach equipment; missing options directly limit bids and task coverage.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、超长工装、稳定和作业范围
requirements.en: Long stick, long reach, stability and working range

body.zh: 挖掘、回转和提升循环需要动力、回转力矩和全电控协调。
body.en: Dig, swing and boom cycles require coordinated power, swing torque and electrohydraulic control.

requirements.zh: 循环、回转、提升、燃油和视野
requirements.en: Cycle time, swing, boom lift, fuel and visibility

body.zh: 大流量附件是徐工基础优势，持续作业仍需验证冷却、结构和回油。
body.en: High-flow attachments are an XCMG foundation strength, while sustained work still requires cooling, structural and return-line validation.

requirements.zh: AUX、PTO、卸油、冷却和防护
requirements.en: AUX, PTO, case drain, cooling and guarding

basis.zh: 挖掘力和系统流量具备重载基础。
basis.en: Digging force and system flow provide a heavy-duty base.

gap.zh: 老旧负流量平台和发动机功率不足削弱持续效率。
gap.en: The aging negative-flow platform and limited engine power reduce sustained productivity.

action.zh: 评估动力与全电控液压平台升级。
action.en: Evaluate an engine and full electrohydraulic platform upgrade.

basis.zh: 基本参数与卡特接近。
basis.en: Base parameters are close to Caterpillar.

gap.zh: 挖掘深度略低，长斗杆与超长工装不足。
gap.en: Digging depth is lower and long-stick/long-reach coverage is insufficient.

action.zh: 建立标准、长斗杆和长臂三层工装策略。
action.en: Establish standard, long-stick and long-reach work-equipment tiers.

basis.zh: 挖掘力和流量优于历史标杆判断。
basis.en: Digging force and flow were rated favorably in the historical comparison.

gap.zh: 起吊能力和回转力矩略低。
gap.en: Lift and swing torque are slightly lower.

action.zh: 通过配重、结构、回转和动臂提升联合优化。
action.en: Jointly optimize counterweight, structure, swing and boom lift.

basis.zh: 附件液压具备扩展基础。
basis.en: Attachment hydraulics provide an expansion base.

gap.zh: 全电控智能化和高级安全功能落后。
gap.en: Full electrohydraulic intelligence and advanced safety features trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 导入 2D/3D、称重、环视和电子围栏并量化收益。
action.en: Introduce 2D/3D, payload, surround view and e-fence and quantify benefit.

concentration.en: Three leading brands hold about 80% combined

role.zh: 33-40 吨是中大挖热门规格，覆盖道路桥梁、城市建设、土方和初级石方；主流品牌同时布局常规尾、短尾和高低配。
role.en: The 33-40 t range is a core large excavator class for roads, bridges, urban construction, earthmoving and entry-level rock work. Leading brands offer conventional-tail, short-tail and multiple performance tiers.

transport.zh: 资料采用四轴低底盘拖车，承载能力参考 38-45 t，并明确需要超宽、超高和超重许可。
transport.en: The reference uses a four-axle lowboy with 38-45 t payload capability and identifies oversize-width, height and weight permits.

customers.zh: 大型土方、道路桥梁、城市建设、采石场和设备租赁客户
customers.en: Large earthmoving, road/bridge, urban construction, quarry and rental customers

jobs.zh: 大斗容装车、重载挖掘、道路基础、破碎、吊装和石方
jobs.en: Large-bucket loading, heavy digging, road foundations, breaking, lifting and rock work

purchase.zh: 吨产量、可靠性、运输、重型工装、回转效率、智能化和全生命周期成本
purchase.en: Tons per hour, reliability, transport, heavy work equipment, swing productivity, intelligence and lifecycle cost

body.zh: 高频装车依赖斗容、回转力矩、动臂提升和稳定性，型号高低配通常围绕这些能力分层。
body.en: High-cycle loading depends on bucket capacity, swing torque, boom lift and stability, which often define model tiers.

requirements.zh: 斗容、回转、提升、稳定和循环时间
requirements.en: Bucket capacity, swing, boom lift, stability and cycle time

body.zh: 基础开挖、回填、边坡和预制件吊装要求工作范围、起吊和智能平地。
body.en: Foundation excavation, backfill, slopes and precast handling require working range, lift and intelligent grading.

requirements.zh: 工作范围、起吊、2D/3D 和视野
requirements.en: Working range, lift, 2D/3D and visibility

body.zh: 重型动臂、宽底盘、破碎管路和驾驶防护决定石方入门能力及持续耐久。
body.en: Heavy boom, wide undercarriage, breaker plumbing and cab guarding determine entry-level rock capability and sustained durability.

requirements.zh: 重型工装、底盘、AUX、冷却和防护
requirements.en: Heavy work equipment, undercarriage, AUX, cooling and guarding

body.zh: 短尾机型补齐城市建设和人口密集区域需求，常规尾无法完全替代。
body.en: A short-tail variant fills urban and dense-area demand that a conventional-tail machine cannot fully cover.

requirements.zh: 短尾型谱、环视、运输和安全边界
requirements.en: Short-tail portfolio, surround view, transport and safety envelope

basis.zh: 常规尾 XE360U 覆盖主流土方。
basis.en: The conventional-tail XE360U covers mainstream earthmoving.

gap.zh: 缺少成熟短尾产品；运输高度和工作范围弱于标杆。
gap.en: A mature short-tail product is missing, and transport height/working range trail the benchmark.

action.zh: 补齐短尾型谱并优化运输高度与标准工装。
action.en: Complete the short-tail portfolio and optimize transport height and standard work equipment.

basis.zh: 斗杆配置较全，挖掘力具备优势。
basis.en: Stick choices are broad and digging force is a strength.

gap.zh: 缺少重型动臂与更宽底盘组合。
gap.en: Heavy-boom and wider-undercarriage combinations are missing.

action.zh: 形成土方、重载和石方工装包。
action.en: Create earthmoving, heavy-duty and rock work-equipment packages.

basis.zh: 基础行走和挖掘性能能够覆盖主流任务。
basis.en: Base travel and digging performance cover mainstream tasks.

gap.zh: 没有自动双速，回转力矩低于卡特。
gap.en: Automatic two-speed is missing and swing torque trails Caterpillar.

action.zh: 升级自动双速并按装车循环优化回转与提升。
action.en: Add automatic two-speed and optimize swing/boom lift using loading cycles.

basis.zh: 现有平台可承载附件与辅助功能。
basis.en: The current platform can host attachment and assist functions.

gap.zh: 智控、环视和高级作业辅助不足。
gap.en: Machine intelligence, surround view and advanced work assists are insufficient.

action.zh: 导入 2D/3D、称重、环视和电子围栏。
action.en: Introduce 2D/3D, payload, surround view and e-fence.

concentration.zh: 四个领先品牌合计超过 85%

role.zh: 40-60 吨是高价值大挖规格，覆盖大型土方、道路桥梁、石方和入门级采矿；运输拆分能力已经成为产品竞争力的一部分。
role.en: The 40-60 t range is a high-value large-excavator class for major earthmoving, roads/bridges, rock and entry-level mining. Transport disassembly capability is part of product competitiveness.

transport.zh: 资料采用五轴低底盘拖车，重型机具可能需要六轴；XE490U 高 4,400 mm、宽 3,592 mm，历史判断认为高度超过 4,267 mm 后需要引导车并显著增加成本。
transport.en: The reference uses a five-axle lowboy, potentially six axles with heavy tools. XE490U height is 4,400 mm and width 3,592 mm; the historical assessment indicates that height above 4,267 mm requires escort support and materially raises cost.

customers.zh: 大型土方、道路桥梁、采石场、矿山承包商和大型租赁客户
customers.en: Major earthmoving, road/bridge, quarry, mining contractors and large rental fleets

jobs.zh: 大斗容装车、重载挖掘、破碎、石方、深沟、吊装和矿山辅助
jobs.en: Large-bucket loading, heavy digging, breaking, rock, deep trenches, lifting and mine support

purchase.zh: 吨产量、运输拆分、回转与起吊、重型工装、底盘、智能化、可靠性和服务能力
purchase.en: Tons per hour, transport disassembly, swing and lift, heavy work equipment, undercarriage, intelligence, reliability and service capability

body.zh: 320 kW 动力和挖掘力支持大斗容作业，但回转、提升和稳定性决定最终循环产量。
body.en: The 320 kW engine and digging force support large buckets, while swing, boom lift and stability determine final cycle output.

requirements.zh: 斗容、回转、提升、稳定和燃油
requirements.en: Bucket capacity, swing, boom lift, stability and fuel

body.zh: 高流量机具、PTO 和防护支持破碎作业，履带、结构、冷却和回转冲击决定耐久。
body.en: High-flow tools, PTO and guarding support breaker work, while track system, structure, cooling and swing shock determine durability.

requirements.zh: AUX/PTO、履带、结构、冷却和防护
requirements.en: AUX/PTO, tracks, structure, cooling and guarding

body.zh: 缺少长斗杆会限制深沟和大型基础任务，起吊与回转力矩决定管件和构件搬运效率。
body.en: Lack of a long stick limits deep trenches and major foundations; lift and swing torque determine pipe and component handling.

requirements.zh: 长斗杆、挖深、起吊、回转和稳定
requirements.en: Long stick, depth, lift, swing and stability

body.zh: 高负荷和长循环要求整机持续产量、可靠性、底盘耐久和快速服务。
body.en: High loads and long cycles require sustained output, reliability, undercarriage durability and rapid service.

requirements.zh: 持续功率、热平衡、底盘、远程管理和服务
requirements.en: Sustained power, thermal balance, undercarriage, telematics and service

basis.zh: 整机宽度处于资料参考的引导车边界内。
basis.en: Machine width is within the referenced escort threshold.

gap.zh: 运输高度高、标配履带窄，缺少伸缩底盘和可拆配重。
gap.en: Transport height is high, standard tracks are narrow, and retractable undercarriage/removable counterweight are unavailable.

action.zh: 以运输成本为目标开发伸缩底盘、可拆配重和履带选项。
action.en: Develop retractable undercarriage, removable counterweight and track options against a transport-cost target.

basis.zh: 320 kW 动力、挖掘力、AUX1/AUX2、PTO 和合流具备优势。
basis.en: The 320 kW engine, digging force, AUX1/AUX2, PTO and flow combining are strengths.

gap.zh: 长斗杆和更完整工装覆盖不足。
gap.en: Long-stick and broader work-equipment coverage are insufficient.

action.zh: 建立土方、深沟、石方和矿山四类工装包。
action.en: Create earthmoving, deep-trench, rock and mine work-equipment packages.

basis.zh: 重载挖掘力支持高负荷作业。
basis.en: Heavy digging force supports high-load work.

gap.zh: 回转力矩、起吊和动臂提升速度弱于卡特，影响装车。
gap.en: Swing torque, lift and boom speed trail Caterpillar and reduce loading productivity.

action.zh: 按大斗容装车循环联合优化回转、提升、配重和稳定。
action.en: Jointly optimize swing, boom lift, counterweight and stability using large-bucket loading cycles.

basis.zh: 机具系统为智能控制提供接口基础。
basis.en: The attachment system provides an integration base for intelligent control.

gap.zh: 智控、360°环视和运输辅助弱于高端标杆。
gap.en: Machine intelligence, 360-degree vision and transport aids trail the premium benchmark.

action.zh: 导入作业辅助、环视、称重和远程健康管理。
action.en: Introduce work assists, surround view, payload and remote health management.
